channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 6 rescued as efforts for missing continue following California avalanche: Authorities
item.description: Search crews responded to a report of an avalanche that occurred Tuesday in the Castle Peak area of California's Sierra Nevada, the Nevada County Sher...

item.title: Democratic lawmakers ask watchdogs to probe ex-lobbyists serving in Trump admin.
item.description: Four congressional Democrats are asking inspectors general to probe whether ex-lobbyists in the administration broke ethics rules to benefit former cl...

item.title: H.R. McMaster reacts to Trump's efforts to stop Iran's nuclear progress
item.description: H.R. McMaster, who served as a national security adviser during President Trump's first term, joins CBS News 24/7 Mornings to discuss apparent progres...

item.title: Crews search for 9 skiers missing after California avalanche near Lake Tahoe
Late-night host Stephen Colbert isn’t backing down from public dispute with CBS bosses
item.description: Colbert said that he was surprised by a network statement that denied Colbert had been told he couldn’t air an interview with a Texas Senate candidate...

item.title: Ghislaine Maxwell's brother talks Prince Andrew, her petition for freedom, and more
item.description: Ghislaine Maxwell's brother, speaking to ABC News, discusses his sister's recent deposition before Congress, her ongoing petition to overturn her conv...

item.title: French far-left party linked to activist's killing reports bomb threat
item.description: The far-left France Unbowed party says it evacuated its Paris office due to a bomb threat as 2 more people were detained over the killing of a far-rig...

item.title: Zelenskyy says Putin playing for time as U.S.-brokered talks wrap up
item.description: U.S.-brokered Ukraine-Russia peace talks wrap up with little to show, and Zelenskyy accusing Moscow of playing for time

item.title: WATCH: Man seen ripping toddler away from mother in Italian supermarket
item.description: Police arrested the man, and the girl suffered a broken leg amid the chaos.

item.title: WATCH: Lindsey Vonn documents journey from Italy to US
item.description: The American skiing star broke her leg in Olympic competition and underwent multiple surgeries.

item.title: How Democrats are feeling about their party, according to a new AP-NORC poll
WATCH: Man, grandmother go viral teaching Italian heritage
item.description: ABC News' Danny New speaks with a Canadian teacher and his nonna who are educating millions about their Italian culture through music.

item.title: Judge: Lawsuit against Buffalo Wild Wings has "no meat on its bones"
item.description: A federal judge dismissed a lawsuit filed by an Illinois man who alleged that Buffalo Wild Wings' use of the term "boneless wings" was deceptive.
